characters.appearance: Young woman, slim build, light complexion, long dark hair.
characters.wardrobe: Black sleeveless top and dark pants.

scenes.supernova_script: [crowd cheering, upbeat music playing, no speech]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes a high-energy, celebratory mood to hook the viewer.
- Uses relatable on-screen text to show the emotional payoff of learning English.
- Replaces the pop-culture reference with a professional milestone (giving a presentation) to better resonate with Supernova's working-professional audience.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
अरे...
मैंने Supernova के साथ रोज़ practice करके English बोलना सीख लिया!
Confidence एकदम बढ़ गया है!
आज office की meeting में मैंने पूरी presentation English में दी?!! [Hey...
I learned to speak English by practicing daily with Supernova!
Confidence has totally gone up!
Today in the office meeting, I gave the whole presentation in English?!!]
